team.name: Selina Fan
team.bio: Selina founded Inpetto after 7 years leading brand and content strategy at agencies across Melbourne and Shanghai. She's obsessed with the intersection of creativity and culture — and building brands that actually mean something.

team.name: James Moretti
team.bio: James leads strategy across all client accounts. With a background in digital marketing at a Big 4 consulting firm, he brings rigour and creativity in equal measure.

team.name: Chloe Wang
team.bio: Chloe manages paid social across Meta and TikTok for Inpetto's clients. She's overseen $2M+ in ad spend and has a talent for finding the creative angles that convert.

team.name: Kevin Chen
team.bio: Kevin leads content production at Inpetto — overseeing video, photography, and design. He's worked with brands from streetwear startups to ASX-listed companies.

team.name: Michelle Lin
team.bio: Michelle manages Inpetto's influencer relationships and campaigns. She's built partnerships with 500+ creators across lifestyle, fashion, beauty, and food verticals.

team.name: Jason Liu
team.bio: Jason turns data into decisions. He builds reporting dashboards, tracks growth metrics, and ensures every strategy is grounded in real insights — not guesswork.
